title: drosera spatulata var. loureiroi
intro: Drosera spatulata var. loureiroi, also known as the Chinese sundew, is a carnivorous plant that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting small insects. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Drosera spatulata var. loureiroi include its potential to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate sinus congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other ingredients to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various health conditions.
